metadata._description: Azure SQL Database Security Monitoring Workbook

metadata.description: Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace

properties.serializedData:
[concat('{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"p_timerange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":172800000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]},"label":"Time Range"},{"id":"p_server","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"ServerName","type":2,"isRequired":false,"query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| distinct LogicalServerName
| order by LogicalServerName asc","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","value":null,"label":"SQL Server"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":11,"content":{"version":"LinkItem/1.0","style":"tabs","links":[{"id":"tab_overview","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Overview","subTarget":"overview","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_bruteforce","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Brute Force","subTarget":"bruteforce","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_threatintel","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Threat Intel","subTarget":"threatintel","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_sql","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"SQL Activity","subTarget":"sql","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_connections","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Connections","subTarget":"connections","style":"link"}]},"name":"tabs"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Azure SQL Database Security Overview
---"},"name":"overview_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN"
| summarize TotalLogins = count(), SuccessfulLogins = countif(Succeeded == true), FailedLogins = countif(Succeeded == false), UniqueIPs = dcount(ClientIp), UniqueUsers = dcount(ServerPrincipalName), UniqueServers = dcount(LogicalServerName)
| extend FailureRate = round(todouble(FailedLogins) / max_of(todouble(TotalLogins), 1.0) * 100, 1)","size":4,"title":"Authentication Metrics","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalLogins","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"}},"showBorder":true}},"name":"overview_tiles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN"
| extend Result = iff(Succeeded == true, "Success", "Failed")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Result
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Authentication Trend (Success vs Failed)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"Failed","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Success","color":"green"}]}},"name":"overview_trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN"
| where Succeeded == false
| summarize FailedLogins = count(), AttemptedUsers = make_set(ServerPrincipalName, 5) by ClientIp, LogicalServerName
| order by FailedLogins desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Failed Login Sources","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailedLogins","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redDark"}}]}},"name":"overview_top_ips"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by ActionName
| order by Count desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Event Distribution by Action","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"overview_actions"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"overview"},"name":"group_overview"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Brute Force Detection
---
Detects IPs with high failed authentication counts. Unlike MySQL, Azure SQL `Succeeded` field is directly available."},"name":"bf_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN") and Succeeded == false
| summarize FailedLogins = count(), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated), DistinctUsers = dcount(ServerPrincipalName), AttemptedUsers = make_set(ServerPrincipalName, 10), TargetDBs = make_set(DatabaseName, 5) by ClientIp, LogicalServerName
| where FailedLogins >= 5
| extend AttackDurationMin = datetime_diff("minute", LastAttempt, FirstAttempt)
| extend AttackRate = round(todouble(FailedLogins) / max_of(todouble(AttackDurationMin), 1.0), 1)
| order by FailedLogins desc","size":0,"title":"Brute Force Attempts","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailedLogins","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redDark"}},{"columnMatch":"AttackRate","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"name":"bf_table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN") and Succeeded == false
| summarize FailedAttempts = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ClientIp
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Failed Login Timeline (per IP)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"name":"bf_timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN") and Succeeded == false
| summarize Count = count() by ServerPrincipalName
| order by Count desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Targeted Usernames","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"bf_users"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN") and Succeeded == false
| summarize Count = count() by DatabaseName
| order by Count desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Targeted Databases","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"bf_databases"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"bruteforce"},"name":"group_bruteforce"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## VirusTotal Threat Intelligence
---
IP reputation enrichment from VirusTotal. Requires Logic App enrichment pipeline.

> **Note:** Adapt the MySQL VirusTotal Logic App to query `SQLSecurityAuditEvents` and write to `SqlThreatIntel_CL` for SQL-specific enrichment."},"name":"ti_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SqlThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IPAddress
| project IPAddress, ResourceName_s, FailedConnections_d, ThreatScore_d, VT_Malicious_d, VT_Suspicious_d, VT_Harmless_d, VT_Country_s, VT_ASOwner_s, VT_Network_s, AttemptedUsers_s, TimeGenerated
| order by ThreatScore_d desc","size":0,"title":"Enriched Threat IPs","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ThreatScore_d","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redDark"}},{"columnMatch":"VT_Malicious_d","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"red"}},{"columnMatch":"FailedConnections_d","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"name":"ti_table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SqlThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IPAddress
| extend ThreatLevel = case(ThreatScore_d >= 5, "High", ThreatScore_d >= 3, "Medium", "Low")
| summarize Count = count() by ThreatLevel","size":0,"title":"Threat Level Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"High","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Medium","color":"orange"},{"seriesName":"Low","color":"green"}]}},"name":"ti_level"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"threatintel"},"name":"group_threatintel"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## SQL Activity Monitoring
---
DDL, DCL, sensitive operations and potential SQL injection."},"name":"sql_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has_any ("CREATE", "ALTER", "DROP", "RENAME")
| where ClassTypeDescription has_any ("OBJECT", "TABLE", "VIEW", "PROCEDURE", "FUNCTION", "INDEX", "SCHEMA")
    or ActionName has "SCHEMA OBJECT"
| project TimeGenerated, LogicalServerName, ActionName, ClassTypeDescription, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, SchemaName, ObjectName, Statement
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Schema Changes (DDL)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"sql_ddl"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has_any ("GRANT", "REVOKE", "ADD MEMBER", "DROP MEMBER", "ALTER ROLE")
    or ActionName has_any ("DATABASE PERMISSION CHANGE", "DATABASE PRINCIPAL CHANGE")
| project TimeGenerated, LogicalServerName, ActionName, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, ObjectName, Statement, Succeeded
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Permission Changes (DCL)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"sql_dcl"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has_any ("BACKUP", "RESTORE", "BULK", "DBCC")
    or Statement has_any ("BACKUP", "RESTORE", "BULK INSERT", "OPENROWSET", "OPENDATASOURCE", "DBCC")
| project TimeGenerated, LogicalServerName, ActionName, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, Statement, Succeeded
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Sensitive Operations (Backup/Restore/Bulk/DBCC)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"sql_sensitive"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResponseRows > 10000
| summarize LargeQueries = count(), TotalRows = sum(ResponseRows), MaxRows = max(ResponseRows), AvgDurationMs = avg(DurationMs) by ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, LogicalServerName, DatabaseName
| order by TotalRows desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"High-Volume Data Access (>10K rows)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TotalRows","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}},{"columnMatch":"MaxRows","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"red"}}]}},"name":"sql_exfil"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"sql"},"name":"group_sql"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Connection Analysis
---
Login patterns, source applications, and authentication trends."},"name":"conn_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" and Succeeded == true
| summarize Logins = count() by ServerPrincipalName
| order by Logins desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Logins by User","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"conn_by_user"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" and Succeeded == true
| summarize Logins = count() by ClientIp
| order by Logins desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Logins by Source IP","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"conn_by_ip"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| where isnotempty(ApplicationName)
| summarize Logins = count() by ApplicationName
| order by Logins desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Logins by Application","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"conn_by_app"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| extend Result = iff(Succeeded == true, "Success", "Failed")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Result
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Authentication Volume Over Time","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"areachart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"Failed","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Success","color":"green"}]}},"name":"conn_timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize TotalLogins = count(), FailedLogins = countif(Succeeded == false), SuccessLogins = countif(Succeeded == true) by ServerName
| extend FailRate = round(todouble(FailedLogins) / max_of(todouble(TotalLogins), 1.0) * 100, 1)
| project ServerName, TotalLogins, SuccessLogins, FailedLogins, FailRate","size":0,"title":"Login Summary per Server","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailRate","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}},{"columnMatch":"FailedLogins","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"red"}}]}},"name":"conn_summary"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"connections"},"name":"group_connections"}],"isLocked":false}')]
